mentions.note: Gold mining stock; Cramer not bullish on gold sector. Alignment with Larry Williams bearish gold thesis. Avoid gold timing.

High-quality gold miner Cramer knows well for consistency; preferred over Newmont due to 20+ year track record; part of gold miners rebound post-parabolic move; owns physical gold + miners strategy preferred.
Preferred gold play over commodity-driven Barrick; less subject to speculative trading; CEO credibility on industry dynamics.

Gold at $5K/oz sustainable; second-largest global gold miner by market cap and production. Strategic advantage: tier-one geology AND tier-one political stability in Canada, Finland, Australia, Mexico. 1.5M oz production growth over 5 years from major projects. Only 2% of above-ground supply produced annually; new mines take 10–15 years — supply won't flood. 42-year dividend streak; now prioritizing buybacks. Bullish on central bank gold demand and geopolitical disorder.
Best gold miner for participating in permanent gold shortage. Only 1% of world gold replaced annually; geopolitical uncertainty and weak dollar support.
Cramer's preferred gold play over Barrick; owns gold, not a trader; gold bug philosophy to accumulate on dips.
Favorite gold company; solid diversification for portfolio; precious metals exposure.
